hotel_name: Khách sạn The One Cà Mau

reviews.title: SO BAD
reviews.text: Booked a room in advance, but when arriving to check-in, they said there were no rooms available. Made the guests go back and forth between two hotels.

reviews.title: Not worth staying.
reviews.text: This hotel was an utter disappointment. The staff showed no enthusiasm or hospitality – their indifferent and unprofessional attitude ruined the stay from the moment of check-in. The towels were old, faded, and honestly looked like dirty rags used for wiping tables – completely unacceptable for any service facility. The bathroom was tiny, so cramped it was difficult to even turn around, failing to meet even the most basic standards. The toilet door had a broken handle, hanging loosely and looked like it belonged in an abandoned building. Truly a dismal experience, not worth a single penny spent. Never coming back.

reviews.title: Rất tệ so với giá tiền (worst at this price)
reviews.text:
Phòng rất dơ (very dirty room)
- Sàn nhà nhớt, có gián, bọ và côn trung trên trần nhà (floor wasnt cleaned well, many insects in room)
- Không có nước nóng ( no hot water)
- Thùng rác không được thay làm sạch (trashbin wasnt cleaned or replaced)
- Khăn tắm/ khăn mặt bị dơ đen (towels werent clean enough to use)

reviews.title: The room is in a terrible mess.
reviews.text: The mirror is dirty, the shower head has weak water flow, and the items are makeshift. The bathroom with its high ceiling made me fall a few times.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The staff is a drawback for this hotel. They do not warmly welcome guests, give out the wrong rooms, and communicate unprofessionally. The room has a strong musty smell and there are cockroaches.

reviews.title: Disappointment
reviews.text:
- The exhaust fan is very loud
- The room design is not nice
- The faucet is broken
- The floor of the room is cracked
- The bed sheets and blankets are not clean, making my friend itch
- The furniture is old and worn-out

reviews.title: Not quite clean
reviews.text: Staffs should be trained not to be noisy peaking looking info your window due to privacy cerncern

reviews.title: Sell this room and hand over another room.
reviews.text: The room in the picture I bought is at The One 2, but when I asked for the support number, I was directed to The One 1 and assigned a room that didn't match the photo. After that, I requested a change to the correct room I booked, and the hotel called a taxi for me to go to The One 2 but gave me a smaller room than the one I had booked and said there were no other rooms available. I checked into the room at 4 PM, and it hadn't been cleaned properly; the fridge still had two old corncobs from previous guests, the bathroom was full of a vomit smell and extremely dirty, from a sink full of dirt to the floor, and the ceiling was covered in cobwebs.

reviews.title: Not impressive, won't come back.
reviews.text: Cà Mau inherently does not have many entertainment options, so it feels quite dull. The hotels are of a mid-range price but are not cheap, with no demands for anything more. However, the hotels clearly lack dedication and careful attention, making them old, damp, and smelly. The receptionist (possibly the owner) is not friendly or enthusiastic, showing little interest in guests coming and going. There is no warm welcome for arriving guests, nor is there any joy when guests leave.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The room had this very strong moldy smell and toilet was not that clean.

reviews.title: Suitable price but not really clean
reviews.text: The facilities is quite good, but the smell in the toilet not good , the cleanliness of the bed and towels are bad too

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The hotel room has no windows, so it smells musty. Anyone with a nasal allergy will have a reaction when breathing.

reviews.title: The One
reviews.text: The staffs are terrible .  They acted  as if customers are not valuable.  They don't care about basic services such as being friendly

reviews.title: Dissatisfied
reviews.text:
New KS but very dirty, the housekeeping staff is careless so everything in the room is very dirty, the bed linens are also dirty, not washed properly and have a bad smell, both the old and new sections are equally dirty. Only the reception staff are enthusiastic. 
The breakfast area is a separate area nearby, making it inconvenient to walk a distance, breakfast food only includes items like noodles, bread... only one dish with no drinks, if you want a drink you have to buy separately, very bad. 
In summary, I feel deceived and will not return for a second time.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: I booked 2 rooms for 1 night, one with 2 single beds and one with a double bed. The spring mattress is quite saggy, causing back pain; my room with 2 single beds also had cockroaches, was stuffy, had a damp smell, and the bed was propped up with bricks. The price is not cheap, and there was no drinking water in the room. Overall, it is not satisfactory compared to the price.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: In the booking, breakfast is free but they charge the customers for coffee.

reviews.title: Average
reviews.text: The room has a musty smell, and the carpet in the middle of the room is very dirty. Everything else is at an average level.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The hotel is damp, has a smell, has poor furnishings, the bathroom is small and cramped, not worth the money, and I will not return. I hope the hotel improves.

reviews.title: It is suitable to go with family.
reviews.text: The small room has no windows, it's cramped and stuffy. The breakfast place is a walk away at an intersection, and the service is slow. There is no staff room for the drivers, and there's no discount for the drivers! On the plus side, the receptionist was friendly and welcomed the group late at night.

reviews.title: Pretty good
reviews.text: The quality is commensurate with the price. The owner should upgrade sanitary equipment.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The room smells musty, and the bathroom is not cleaned properly (the glass door and hanging mirror are very dirty).

reviews.title: Overall is okay for short stays.
reviews.text:
Beware of loud noise in the early morning and late evening. People spoke, knocked and slammed the door  in the hallway. 

Don’t expect the room soundproof like 4 or 5 stars hotels. 

Asked for free breakfast voucher at the counter and took a short stroll to the coffee shop at the corner, breakfast served from 7AM to 9AM.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Clean room, average restroom, normal breakfast, no coffee.

reviews.title: Review The One Ca Mau
reviews.text: This hotel is okay, but if you want a selfie with a beautiful view, this one is not a good choice.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is good in many aspects, so it's worth staying. However, the mattress is soft and sagging, making it not very comfortable to sleep on.

reviews.title: 2 đêm
reviews.text: Ngay trung tâm, tiện đi lại. Không có nước nóng do dùng năng lượng mặt trời, tắm không được vì lạnh.  Ăn sáng lựa chọn tô, đợi lâu

reviews.title: New and good hotel
reviews.text: Central hotel, convenient for sightseeing. The downside is the simple breakfast with only one dish.

reviews.title: Phòng khá ổn
reviews.text: Quạt hút kêu to ồn.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The room is clean and quiet, however the mattress is a bit soft, so I'm not used to it. The breakfast is monotonous and unappetizing, consisting of only one savory dish and iced tea, with no coffee or fruit juice included.

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: It is ok to stay here as the price is reasonable and the location is perfect. The staff is not friendly and need to improve cleanness.

reviews.title: Best place in town
reviews.text:
(English below)
Vị trí khách sạn rất thuận tiện, gần quảng trường con tôm, vincom và khách sạn Mường Thanh.
Ưu điểm đường rất rộng thoáng, KHÔNG NGẬP NƯỚC, lễ tân vui vẻ nhiệt tình.
Phòng có hơi ẩm 1 chút nhưng vẫn đầy đủ tiện nghi và dịch vụ.

reviews.title: Clean and beautiful
reviews.text:
Very high class hotel for this part of the country
Rooms are big and clean and modern
Nearby had many cafes and eateries

reviews.title: Stable
reviews.text: The hotel is located in the new central area of Ca Mau City, with spacious and airy surroundings, next to Vincom. However, my room on the first floor had a lot of mosquitoes, so next time I stay, I will bring a mosquito spray bottle.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Staff is friendly and helpful 😁 
Hotel is nice, quite and clean 🪥
Suitable for group and lowkey introvert

reviews.title: Travel to Ca Mau
reviews.text: The room is clean and tidy, with reasonable prices, but guests should be invited inside to sit around 3 or 4 AM when they arrive early due to the bus's early arrival. Sitting outside leads to mosquito bites.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Everything is good, convenient, the room is clean and airy, the owner is friendly and thoughtful.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room looks beautiful like the pictures, but the space is a bit small, and the soundproofing isn't very good. I slept in a bit this morning, but the guests outside were talking loudly, which startled me a few times.

reviews.title: Clean stylish hotel
reviews.text:
Clean hotel with friendly staff
We had issue with our Ac and was offered upgrade to vip room after negotiating with the staff ( should have been an automatic offer)
Breakfast is not inside the hotel,  you have to walk 5 mins
Great quite location

reviews.title: Chỗ ở yên tĩnh
reviews.text: Đường rộng, đậu xe thoải mái, yên tĩnh. Buổi tối đi bộ qua Vin có quán ốc rất đông khách.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel owner is friendly, pleasant, and very accommodating to guests.

reviews.title: Satisfied
reviews.text: Third time back here, still satisfied with 5 stars.

reviews.title: Ca Mau
reviews.text: Clean room is 10 square meters.

reviews.title: Satisfied
reviews.text: Satisfaction with the service

reviews.title: 価格相応です。
reviews.text: 普通に泊まれます。

Ẩm thấp,hôi,

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Quá tệ, phòng nhỏ, bán trên giá agoda  giá ****, nhân viên khách sạn báo cho khách đến nhận phòng có ****, làm người đặt hộ mất uy tín,  phòng khách sạn trên hình rõ rộng, nhưng khi đến nhận phòng thì quá nhỏ chặt hẹp, đặt phòng có ăn sáng, nv khách sạn cũng không thông báo cho khách, khách không được ăn sáng tệ tệ vô cùng

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Phòng hôi mốc, tiện nghi cũ ,nv lễ tân ko thân thiện, dọn phòng ko sạch 
Nói chung là tệ và sẽ ko bao giờ quay lại

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: khách sạn dở, ẩm mốc và nồng nặc mùi chất tẩy rửa, nhân viên thiếu thân thiện, ăn sáng chỉ có 1 món duy nhất. khăn tắm cũ..nói chung dở
